projectDescription: A personal portfolio website for web developer Ronald Santana, built with Astro and Bootstrap, showcasing projects and professional skills.
keyFeatures: Astro-powered static site for fast performance
Content Collections for managing project entries
Animated page load transitions using CSS keyframes
Intersection Observer API for scroll-triggered animations
Minimal single-column layout optimized for readability
publicApiSurface: src/content/projects/ — Markdown files defining project entries (title, description, pubDate, heroImage, tag, url)
src/components/Card.astro — Props: src, description, title, tag, url
src/components/Footer.astro — Footer with social links and copyright
